market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: US, UK treasuries to align transatlantic rules on tokenization and stablecoins
articles.description: The two governments issued recommendations on the treatment of digital assets as the US prepares to implement a 2025 law on payment stablecoins.

articles.title: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta
articles.description: If you’ve been waiting to try Apple’s revamped Siri without installing a developer beta, you now can. The company on Tuesday released the iOS 27 public beta, giving iPhone owners early access to its AI-powered assistant and other new features before the software’s official launch this fall.

articles.title: The founder of Hinge raised $18M to build a new AI dating service, Overtone
articles.description: Overtone describes itself as "a voice- and audio-forward service, enabled by AI, that provides highly curated introductions."

articles.title: Some U.S. Senate Democrats come out against Clarity Act, calling it a 'corrupt' bill
articles.description: Certain Democrats are taking an increasingly rigorous stand against the crypto market structure bill, which needs a significant number from their party to pass.

articles.title: 監管前沿 AI 刻不容緩，Demis Hassabis 籲美國設立獨立標準機構
articles.description: Google DeepMind 執行長哈薩比斯（Demis Hassabis）呼籲成立一個由美國主導的標準機構 […]

articles.title: Lucid Motors denies report it’s considering bankruptcy
articles.description: The company said the "rumors are completely false" after its stock sank more than 50% on a report that it was weighing the option.

articles.title: Google faces another AI training lawsuit from major publishers
articles.description: Hachette, Cengage, Elsevier, and other publishers allege that Google trained its AI on copyrighted works without the necessary permissions.

articles.title: DeepMind CEO calls for an independent standards body to regulate frontier AI
articles.description: DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis is proposing an AI "standards body" modeled after FINRA, to test frontier models and develop best practices for their release.

articles.title: Binance bets on becoming a crypto 'super app' as stablecoins reshape growth
articles.description: Shunyet Jan, Binance’s head of spot trading and derivatives, said the exchange is focusing more on payments and financial services than on trading alone as it drives the next phase of its expansion.

articles.title: The Clarity Act isn't a ticket to sanctions evasion, actually
articles.description: The bill, as currently drafted, has the power to stop sanctions evasion at scale, argues Ari Redbord, global head of policy at TRM Labs.

articles.title: UK government defers capital gains on certain crypto with ‘no gain, no loss’ approach
articles.description: The change in tax policy, expected to effect about 700,000 people in the UK, is tied to the disposal of crypto in lending and liquidity pools.

articles.title: JCB signs Circle MOU to test stablecoin payments in Japan
articles.description: The companies will explore using USDC for JCB’s cross-border treasury operations and merchant payments in Japan as regulated stablecoin adoption gains momentum.

articles.title: Mizuho downgrades Circle to underperform, cuts price target to $50 on Open USD threat
articles.description: The Japanese investment bank said Open USD's yield pass-through model could pressure Circle's margins by shifting more reserve income to distributors.

articles.title: DeepSeek reportedly in talks to raise $1.5B, then IPO
articles.description: DeepSeek, the Chinese large language model developer, is said to be preparing for a 2027 IPO debut as it also looks to raise around $1.5 billion in new funds at a $71 billion valuation.

articles.title: Wikipedia blackout could hurt how AI engines like ChatGPT understand crypto
articles.description: Wikipedia observes guidelines on crypto coverage that date back many years and may now be outdated, according to the report.

articles.title: U.S., UK move to align rules for tokenized finance across world's largest financial markets
articles.description: The joint roadmap aims to reduce regulatory friction for tokenized assets while strengthening ties between the world's two largest financial centers.

articles.title: CleanSpark shares jump 22% after $6.6B Georgia data center lease
articles.description: The Bitcoin miner’s Georgia agreement with an undisclosed investment-grade technology company expands its footprint in AI and high-performance computing infrastructure.

articles.title: Meta’s Adam Mosseri says AI token budgets could soon be capped per engineer
articles.description: Instagram head Adam Mosseri believes companies will eventually need to manage AI token spending the same way they manage payroll or other operating expenses, predicting that engineers could soon face limits on how much they spend using AI tools.

articles.title: Google Images gets a Pinterest-like redesign focused on discovery
articles.description: Now, when users navigate to Google Images, they'll see a "For You" gallery of images tailored to their interests and browsing history.

articles.title: New York State halts construction of all new data centers
articles.description: New York has become the first state to temporarily halt approval of large data centers, as Gov. Kathy Hochul argues the AI-driven building boom shouldn’t come at the expense of higher electricity costs, water supplies, or local control.
